Bash(mkdir -p '/Users/brunojorba/Developer/Proyectos/muebles-rusticos/public/images/gallery/living'
mkdir -p '/Users/brunojorba/Developer/Proyectos/muebles-rusticos/public/images/gallery/dormitorios'

python3 -c "
import os, re, unicodedata, shutil

def sanitize\(name\):
    name = unicodedata.normalize\('NFD', name\)
    name = ''.join\(c for c in name if unicodedata.category\(c\) != 'Mn'\)
    name = name.lower\(\).replace\(' ', '-'\)
    name = re.sub\(r'[^a-z0-9._-]', '', name\)
    name = re.sub\(r'-+', '-', name\)
    return name

categories = [
    \('/Users/brunojorba/Downloads/FOTOS MUEBLES RUSTICOS -version 25 de NOVIEMBRE 2024/2 LIVING', '/Users/brunojorba/Developer/Proyectos/muebles-rusticos/public/images/gallery/living'\),
    \('/Users/brunojorba/Downloads/FOTOS MUEBLES RUSTICOS -version 25 de NOVIEMBRE 2024/3 DORMITORIOS', '/Users/brunojorba/Developer/Proyectos/muebles-rusticos/public/images/gallery/dormitorios'\),
]

for src_dir, dst_dir in categories:
    for f in sorted\(os.listdir\(src_dir\)\):
        if os.path.isfile\(os.path.join\(src_dir, f\)\) and not f.startswith\('.'\):
            new_name = sanitize\(f\)
            shutil.copy2\(os.path.join\(src_dir, f\), os.path.join\(dst_dir, new_name\)\)
            print\(f'{src_dir.split\(\\"/\\"\)[-1]}: {f} -> {new_name}'\)
")

import os, re, unicodedata, shutil

def sanitize\(name\):
    name = unicodedata.normalize\('NFD', name\)
    name = ''.join\(c for c in name if unicodedata.category\(c\) != 'Mn'\)
    name = name.lower\(\).replace\(' ', '-'\)
    name = re.sub\(r'[^a-z0-9._-]', '', name\)
    name = re.sub\(r'-+', '-', name\)
    return name

categories = [
    \('/Users/brunojorba/Downloads/FOTOS MUEBLES RUSTICOS -version 25 de NOVIEMBRE 2024/4 DORMITORIOS DE NIÑOS', '/Users/brunojorba/Developer/Proyectos/muebles-rusticos/public/images/gallery/dormitorios-ninos'\),
    \('/Users/brunojorba/Downloads/FOTOS MUEBLES RUSTICOS -version 25 de NOVIEMBRE 2024/5 BAÑOS Y COCINAS - OK BAJADA', '/Users/brunojorba/Developer/Proyectos/muebles-rusticos/public/images/gallery/banos-y-cocinas'\),
    \('/Users/brunojorba/Downloads/FOTOS MUEBLES RUSTICOS -version 25 de NOVIEMBRE 2024/6 BARBACOAS', '/Users/brunojorba/Developer/Proyectos/muebles-rusticos/public/images/gallery/barbacoas'\),
]

for src_dir, dst_dir in categories:

Bash(python3 -c "
import struct

def get_exif_orientation\(filepath\):
    with open\(filepath, 'rb'\) as f:
        data = f.read\(\)
    i = 2
    while i < len\(data\) - 4:
        marker = struct.unpack\('>H', data[i:i+2]\)[0]
        length = struct.unpack\('>H', data[i+2:i+4]\)[0]
        if marker == 0xFFE1:  # APP1 / EXIF
            exif_data = data[i+4:i+2+length]
            print\(f'  APP1 header: {exif_data[:6]}'\)
            if exif_data[2:6] == b'Exif':
                tiff_data = exif_data[8:]  # skip 'Exif\\x00\\x00'
                byte_order = tiff_data[:2]
                endian = '<' if byte_order == b'II' else '>'
                ifd_offset = struct.unpack\(endian + 'I', tiff_data[4:8]\)[0]
                num_entries = struct.unpack\(endian + 'H', tiff_data[ifd_offset:ifd_offset+2]\)[0]
                for j in range\(num_entries\):
                    entry_offset = ifd_offset + 2 + j * 12
                    tag = struct.unpack\(endian + 'H', tiff_data[entry_offset:entry_offset+2]\)[0]
                    if tag == 0x0112:
                        value = struct.unpack\(endian + 'H', tiff_data[entry_offset+8:entry_offset+10]\)[0]
                        return value
        i += 2 + length
    return None

import os
f = '/Users/brunojorba/Developer/Proyectos/muebles-rusticos/public/images/gallery/living/butaca-con-esterilla-asiento-y-respaldo.jpg'
print\(f'Orientation: {get_exif_orientation\(f\)}'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import struct

def read_exif\(filepath\):
    with open\(filepath, 'rb'\) as f:
        data = f.read\(\)
    i = 2
    while i < len\(data\) - 4:
        marker = struct.unpack\('>H', data[i:i+2]\)[0]
        length = struct.unpack\('>H', data[i+2:i+4]\)[0]
        if marker == 0xFFE1:
            exif_data = data[i+4:i+2+length]
            if exif_data[2:6] == b'Exif':
                tiff_data = exif_data[8:]
                byte_order = tiff_data[:2]
                endian = '<' if byte_order == b'II' else '>'
                ifd_offset = struct.unpack\(endian + 'I', tiff_data[4:8]\)[0]
                num_entries = struct.unpack\(endian + 'H', tiff_data[ifd_offset:ifd_offset+2]\)[0]
                print\(f'  {num_entries} IFD entries, endian={byte_order}'\)
                for j in range\(num_entries\):
                    entry_offset = ifd_offset + 2 + j * 12
                    tag = struct.unpack\(endian + 'H', tiff_data[entry_offset:entry_offset+2]\)[0]
                    typ = struct.unpack\(endian + 'H', tiff_data[entry_offset+2:entry_offset+4]\)[0]
                    count = struct.unpack\(endian + 'I', tiff_data[entry_offset+4:entry_offset+8]\)[0]
                    val_raw = tiff_data[entry_offset+8:entry_offset+12]
                    if tag == 0x0112:
                        val = struct.unpack\(endian + 'H', val_raw[:2]\)[0]
                        print\(f'  ** ORIENTATION TAG: {val}'\)
                    elif tag in \(0x0100, 0x0101, 0xA002, 0xA003\):
                        print\(f'  tag 0x{tag:04X}: {val_raw}'\)
        i += 2 + length

f = '/Users/brunojorba/Developer/Proyectos/muebles-rusticos/public/images/gallery/living/butaca-con-esterilla-asiento-y-respaldo.jpg'
read_exif\(f\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import struct

def read_exif_all\(filepath\):
    with open\(filepath, 'rb'\) as f:
        data = f.read\(\)
    i = 2
    while i < len\(data\) - 4:
        marker = struct.unpack\('>H', data[i:i+2]\)[0]
        length = struct.unpack\('>H', data[i+2:i+4]\)[0]
        if marker == 0xFFE1:
            exif_data = data[i+4:i+2+length]
            tiff_data = exif_data[6:]  # skip 'Exif\\x00\\x00'
            byte_order = tiff_data[:2]
            endian = '<' if byte_order == b'II' else '>'
            ifd_offset = struct.unpack\(endian + 'I', tiff_data[4:8]\)[0]
            num_entries = struct.unpack\(endian + 'H', tiff_data[ifd_offset:ifd_offset+2]\)[0]
            for j in range\(num_entries\):
                eo = ifd_offset + 2 + j * 12
                tag = struct.unpack\(endian + 'H', tiff_data[eo:eo+2]\)[0]
                typ = struct.unpack\(endian + 'H', tiff_data[eo+2:eo+4]\)[0]
                val = tiff_data[eo+8:eo+12]
                print\(f'  tag=0x{tag:04X} type={typ} raw_val={val.hex\(\)}'\)
        i += 2 + length

for fn in ['butaca-con-esterilla-asiento-y-respaldo.jpg', 'butaca-con-rafia.jpg']:
    print\(fn\)
    read_exif_all\(f'/Users/brunojorba/Developer/Proyectos/muebles-rusticos/public/images/gallery/living/{fn}'\)
")

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont
import os

base = '/Users/brunojorba/Developer/Proyectos/muebles-rusticos/public/images/gallery/living'
files = sorted\([f for f in os.listdir\(base\) if f.lower\(\).endswith\(\('.jpg','.jpeg','.png','.webp','.avif'\)\)]\)

thumb_w, thumb_h = 200, 160
label_h = 30
cell_w, cell_h = thumb_w, thumb_h + label_h
cols = 4
rows = \(len\(files\) + cols - 1\) // cols

grid = Image.new\('RGB', \(cols * cell_w + cols, rows * cell_h + rows\), \(180,180,180\)\)

for i, fn in enumerate\(files\):
    r, c = divmod\(i, cols\)
    try:
        img = Image.open\(os.path.join\(base, fn\)\).convert\('RGB'\)
        img.thumbnail\(\(thumb_w, thumb_h\)\)
        cell = Image.new\('RGB', \(thumb_w, thumb_h + label_h\), \(240,240,240\)\)
        cell.paste\(img, \(\(thumb_w - img.width\)//2, \(thumb_h - img.height\)//2\)\)
        draw = ImageDraw.Draw\(cell\)
        # Truncate filename
        name = fn[:28] + '..' if len\(fn\) > 30 else fn
        draw.text\(\(2, thumb_h + 5\), f"{i+1}. {name}", fill=\(0,0,0\)\)
        grid.paste\(cell, \(c * \(cell_w+1\), r * \(cell_h+1\)\)\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f"Error {fn}: {e}"\)

grid.save\('/tmp/living-labeled.jpg', quality=85\)
print\(f"Saved {len\(files\)} images"\)
for i, fn in enumerate\(files\):
    print\(f"{i+1}: {fn}"\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw
import os

base = '/Users/brunojorba/Developer/Proyectos/muebles-rusticos/public/images/gallery'

# For each category, show images with their numbered positions
for cat in ['comedores', 'dormitorios', 'banos-y-cocinas', 'tapiceria']:
    cat_path = os.path.join\(base, cat\)
    files = sorted\([f for f in os.listdir\(cat_path\) if f.lower\(\).endswith\(\('.jpg','.jpeg','.png','.webp','.avif'\)\)]\)
    
    thumb_w, thumb_h = 150, 120
    label_h = 25
    cell_w, cell_h = thumb_w, thumb_h + label_h
    cols = 5
    rows = \(len\(files\) + cols - 1\) // cols
    
    grid = Image.new\('RGB', \(cols * cell_w + cols, rows * cell_h + rows\), \(180,180,180\)\)
    
    for i, fn in enumerate\(files\):
        r, c = divmod\(i, cols\)
        try:
            img = Image.open\(os.path.join\(cat_path, fn\)\).convert\('RGB'\)
            img.thumbnail\(\(thumb_w, thumb_h\)\)
            cell = Image.new\('RGB', \(thumb_w, thumb_h + label_h\), \(240,240,240\)\)
            cell.paste\(img, \(\(thumb_w - img.width\)//2, \(thumb_h - img.height\)//2\)\)
            draw = ImageDraw.Draw\(cell\)
            name = f"{i+1}"
            draw.text\(\(2, thumb_h + 4\), name, fill=\(200,0,0\)\)
            grid.paste\(cell, \(c * \(cell_w+1\), r * \(cell_h+1\)\)\)
        except: pass
    
    grid.save\(f'/tmp/labeled_{cat}.jpg', quality=85\)
    print\(f'{cat}: {len\(files\)} images'\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import struct

# Raw EXIF dump for butaca images
for fn in ['butaca-con-esterilla-asiento-y-respaldo.jpg', 'butaca-con-rafia.jpg']:
    path = f'/Users/brunojorba/Developer/Proyectos/muebles-rusticos/public/images/gallery/living/{fn}'
    with open\(path, 'rb'\) as f:
        data = f.read\(\)
    
    print\(f'\\n{fn}:'\)
    print\(f'  File size: {len\(data\)} bytes'\)
    print\(f'  JPEG SOI: {data[:2].hex\(\)}'\)
    
    # Find all APP1 markers
    i = 2
    while i < min\(len\(data\) - 4, 100000\):
        marker = struct.unpack\('>H', data[i:i+2]\)[0]
        if marker == 0xFFD9:
            break
        length = struct.unpack\('>H', data[i+2:i+4]\)[0]
        if marker >= 0xFFE0:
            print\(f'  Marker 0x{marker:04X} at {i}, length={length}'\)
            if marker == 0xFFE1:
                print\(f'    First 20 bytes: {data[i+4:i+24].hex\(\)}'\)
                # Try to parse EXIF
                payload = data[i+4:i+4+length-2]
                if payload[:6] == b'Exif\\x00\\x00':
                    tiff = payload[6:]
                    bo = tiff[:2]
                    e = '<' if bo == b'II' else '>'
                    ifd_off = struct.unpack\(e+'I', tiff[4:8]\)[0]
                    n = struct.unpack\(e+'H', tiff[ifd_off:ifd_off+2]\)[0]
                    print\(f'    EXIF: {n} IFD0 entries, byte_order={bo}'\)
                    for j in range\(n\):
                        eo = ifd_off + 2 + j*12
                        tag = struct.unpack\(e+'H', tiff[eo:eo+2]\)[0]
                        typ = struct.unpack\(e+'H', tiff[eo+2:eo+4]\)[0]
                        cnt = struct.unpack\(e+'I', tiff[eo+4:eo+8]\)[0]
                        print\(f'      tag=0x{tag:04X} type={typ} count={cnt}'\)
                        if tag == 0x0112:  # Orientation
                            val = struct.unpack\(e+'H', tiff[eo+8:eo+10]\)[0]
                            print\(f'      *** ORIENTATION VALUE: {val}'\)
                    # Check sub-IFD \(ExifIFD pointer = 0x8769\)
                    for j in range\(n\):
                        eo = ifd_off + 2 + j*12
                        tag = struct.unpack\(e+'H', tiff[eo:eo+2]\)[0]
                        if tag == 0x8769:
                            sub_off = struct.unpack\(e+'I', tiff[eo+8:eo+12]\)[0]
                            n2 = struct.unpack\(e+'H', tiff[sub_off:sub_off+2]\)[0]
                            print\(f'    ExifSubIFD at {sub_off}: {n2} entries'\)
        i += 2 + length
EOF)

Bash(node --env-file=.env.local -e "
import\('@supabase/supabase-js'\).then\(\({ createClient }\) => {
  const supabase = createClient\(
    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL,
    process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY,
    { auth: { persistSession: false } }
  \)
  const getUrl = \(path\) => supabase.storage.from\('gallery'\).getPublicUrl\(path\).data.publicUrl
  const updates = [
    { slug: 'comedores',        path: 'comedores/mesa-de-comedor-en-cipres-con-base-de-hierro.jpg' },
    { slug: 'dormitorios',      path: 'dormitorios/respaldo-aro-de-15-cm-tapizado.jpg' },
    { slug: 'dormitorios-ninos',path: 'dormitorios-ninos/cucheta-doble-patinada-hecha-a-medida.jpeg' },
    { slug: 'exterior',         path: 'exterior/sillones-con-posabrazos-mas-bajo.jpg' },
    { slug: 'escritorios',      path: 'escritorios/escritorio-a-pedido-del-cliente-con-moldura-en-alamo1.jpg' },
  ]
  Promise.all\(updates.map\(u =>
    supabase.from\('categories'\).update\({ cover_image_url: getUrl\(u.path\) }\).eq\('slug', u.slug\)
      .then\(\({ error }\) => console.log\(error ? '❌ ' + u.slug + ': ' + error.message : '✅ ' + u.slug\)\)
  \)\)
}\)")
